---
title: "Blog"
subtitle: "Tutorials, insights, and reflections on data science in heritage"
listing:
  contents: posts
  sort: "date desc"
  type: default
  categories: true
  sort-ui: false
  filter-ui: false
  fields: [date, title, author, categories, description]
page-layout: full
title-block-banner: true
---

Welcome to my blog! Here I share tutorials, reflections, and insights on data science, digital heritage, and research methods. Topics include:

- **R tutorials** for heritage researchers
- **Spatial analysis** techniques and workflows
- **Research data management** best practices
- **Open Science** and reproducible research
- **Teaching** reflections and pedagogical approaches
- **Digital archaeology** methods and tools

---

## Subscribe

Want to stay updated? [{{< fa envelope >}} Email me](mailto:nickyjgarland@gmail.com) to be notified of new posts, or follow me on [{{< fa brands github >}} GitHub](https://github.com/nickyjgarland) for code updates.
